author: Hanser
description: A fluid, rail-style floating table of contents for Obsidian. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Hanser
manifest.description: A fluid, rail-style floating table of contents with smooth wave interactions.
manifest.name: Wave TOC

name: Wave TOC

releases.author: Hanser0521
releases.description:
## What's changed

- Generated new release-asset digests so the marketplace no longer associates these files with the unverifiable 1.0.3 provenance record.
- Preserved all marketplace review compatibility fixes without changing the floating TOC interactions or visual behavior.

The release workflow will attach `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` automatically.

releases.author: Hanser0521
releases.description:
## What's changed

- Removed build provenance attestations that the current marketplace verifier could not validate.
- Preserved all marketplace review fixes from 1.0.3: manifest description, popout compatibility, command naming, dependency declarations, regular expressions, and CSS rules.

The release workflow will attach `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` automatically.

releases.author: Hanser0521
releases.description:
## What's changed

- Fixed the marketplace review blocker by removing the redundant product name from the manifest description.
- Improved popout-window compatibility, command naming, dependency declarations, regular expressions, and CSS rules following review feedback.
- Added build provenance attestations for release assets.
- Preserved the hover emphasis fix so only the centered longest tick is darkened in Editing view.

The release workflow will attach `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` automatically.

releases.author: Hanser0521
releases.description:
## 中文

- 新增悬停卡片内容选项：仅标题、标题 + 第一段正文、标题 + 本地摘要。
- 悬停卡片区分标题与摘要字体层级，更接近正文预览卡片效果。
- 摘要在本地从当前笔记内容提取，不会发送笔记内容到外部服务。

## English

- Added hover-card content modes: title only, title plus first paragraph, and title plus locally extracted summary.
- Separated title and preview typography in the hover card for a clearer preview-card layout.
- Summaries are extracted locally from the current note and note content is not sent to external services.

releases.author: Hanser0521
releases.description:
### 中文

- 新增正文滚动自动同步：使用鼠标滚轮浏览笔记时，当前标题对应的刻度会实时跟随，无需先点击正文。
- 新增正文滚动同步方式选项：默认使用“正文滚动时自动跟随”，也可切换为“光标点击后跟随”。
- 提升编辑模式下的定位准确度：根据正文视口中的真实文档行判断当前标题，并使用逐帧调度保持滚动流畅。
- 保持原有视觉规则：正文滚动只改变当前刻度的颜色深浅，不改变刻度长度；波峰动画仍只在鼠标悬停刻度时出现。
- 设置菜单完成汉化，并提供中文与 English 两种界面语言，可随时切换。

### English

- Added automatic scroll tracking so the active tick follows the current section while the note is scrolled, without requiring a click first.
- Added a content scroll tracking option: “Follow while scrolling” is the default, with “Follow after cursor click” also available.
- Improved Editing view accuracy by resolving the document line at the viewport anchor and throttling updates with animation frames for smooth scrolling.
- Preserved the visual behavior: scrolling changes only the active tick color, while tick length and the wave animation remain hover-only.
- Localized the settings menu and added switchable Chinese and English interfaces.
releases.name: Wave TOC 1.0.1

releases.author: Hanser0521
releases.description:
Wave TOC 1.0.0 — first stable release.

Highlights:
- Floating H1–H3 rail inside the active note
- Smooth multi-tick wave hover and heading bubble
- Current section indicator while reading
- Hover-follow and click-to-jump navigation modes
- Configurable side, heading depth, and rail height

Install by downloading `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` into:
`<Vault>/.obsidian/plugins/wave-toc/`
releases.name: Wave TOC 1.0.0
